titleStmt.title: SII 40.232: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 232. (A.R. No. B. 277 of 1933.) Guṇḍlapalle, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone planted in front of the temple of Vīrabhadra.
Qutbshahis of Golkoṇḍa: Abdullah Sultān Mahōmanda Pādaśa.
This is dated Śaka 1551, Vibhava, Kārttīka, śu. 15, corresponding to 1629 A.D.

Records the construction of a temple of Vīrabhadra and a terraced temple for Hanumān, a well and a garden in the village of Guṇḍlapalli in Bellamkoṇḍa-sīma by a certain Payyāvula Vīrarāghava of the Cherukūri-gōtra, for the merit of his chief Mēdarameṭla Ayyapa-Nāyaniṅgāru, while Mēdarameṭla Narasiṁha-Nāyaniṅgāru, son of Ayyapa-Nāyaniṅgāru was administering the sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1551
Agunēṭi vibhavanāma saṁvatsara
kā¨rtika śu 15 lu Abdula sultā
nu mahāmaṁḍapāda gōlakoṁḍa
nuṁḍi pṛthivīsāmrājyaṁ yelucu
ḍaṁgānu śrīlakṣmīnarasiṁhadā
sulaina tammalūri gōtravu punū
ri siṁhākōṭalagoṁgadāyelata
la guṁḍugaṁḍa rācūridu¨rgaha
raṇa koḍamanāyakaragaṁḍa manne su
ltāna birudāṁkitulaina meḍarameṭla liṁ
ganaṁgāri pautrulunnu Āyyapanā
yiniṁgāri putruluṁnnu Ayana
nārasiṁhanāyiniṁgāri nā
yaṁkarānaku naḍicivacce bellaṁkoṁ
ḍasīmalō guṁḍlapalli grāmānanu
cerukūri gōtrōdbhavuṁḍaina payyā
vula vīrarāghavuṁḍu tama yē
luka medarameṭla Ayyapanāyi
niṁgāriki puṇyaṁgānunnu tama ta
ṁḍri rāyapanenikinni tamatāta pā
pinenikinni tama muttāta sesamane
nikinni tamatalli basuvammaku
nnu sukṛ taṁggānu vīrabhadruni dēvu
ḷamunnu śrī hanumānulamidde
nu nuyyinni vanamunnu śrīrāmā
¨rpaṇaṁgānu seyiṁcenu . ma
dvaṁśajiḥ paramahīpati vaṁśajātā
madvaṁśajāḥ satatamujvala dharma
citāḥ maddha¨rmamēva bhuvi pālanā
namācaraṁti . tatpādukadvaya mahā
Digital edition of SII 40.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
